skill: One-variable data: Distributions and measures of center and spread
stem: Two box plots summarize the number of hours of weekly exercise reported by students in two different gym classes. For Class P, the minimum is 1 and the maximum is 7. For Class Q, the minimum is 0 and the maximum is 11. What is the positive difference between the range of the number of hours of exercise for the two classes?
rationale: The range of Class P is 7 − 1 = 6. The range of Class Q is 11 − 0 = 11. The positive difference is 11 − 6 = 5.
